name: The Henri at Pike & Rose
address: 11870 Grand Park Avenue, North Bethesda, MD 20852
bathroomsNote: 2BR units typically have 2 baths; one larger floor plan (B11D, 1,661 sq ft) has 3 baths.
approxRentRange: $2,723-$3,207/mo for 2BR (as of late 2025; larger/premium units listed to $5,371)

notes.management: Managed by Greystar. Leasing office is frequently understaffed per reviews; residents report difficulty reaching management and slow maintenance response requiring multiple follow-up calls.
notes.buildingCondition: Multiple 2024-2025 reviews flag dirty hallway carpets consistently stained, urine in elevators, and reports that cleaning crews stopped vacuuming common areas regularly, leading to insect complaints.
notes.hvac: Uses Variable Refrigerant Flow (VRF) system billed as a usage-based utility; at least one resident reported inability to get unit below 70 degrees and management blocking an HVAC inspection. In-unit thermostat control is standard but VRF issues have been reported.
notes.concierge: A concierge/front desk exists and receives positive mentions in reviews (staff by name); one third-party listing (VeryApt) lists '24-Hour Front Desk' as an amenity, but no official source confirms 24-hour hours. Classified as Likely staffed.
notes.petPolicy: Up to 2 pets per unit, cats and dogs, 70 lb limit each, $50/mo pet rent per pet; breed restrictions apply (pit bulls, rottweilers, dobermans, chows, presa canarios, akitas, malamutes, wolf-hybrids).
notes.floorPlans: Studios, Jr. 1BR, 1BR, 1BR+den, 2BR (some with dens). 2BR sizes range 1,091-1,661 sq ft.
